chapter_title.en: Chapter 188 – The shaving (of the head) and the shortening (of the hair, nails etc.)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/187)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/187)
text: رَجُلٍ يَحْلِقُ رَأْسَهُ بِمَكَّةَ قَالَ يَرُدُّ الشَّعْرَ إِلَى مِنًى .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hafs Al Bakhtary,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> regarding a man who shaves off his head in Makkah. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘He should return the hair to Mina’.
en.sarwar: 9. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘ Umayr from Hafs ibn al-Bakhtariy who has said the following: “About a man who shaves in Makkah abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘He must return (take) his hairs to Mina’.’”
